Procs

proc audioTranscriptions(api: OpenAiApi; model: string; audioData: string): AudioTranscription {.
    ...raises: [ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError, JsonError, ValueError],
    tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Transcribe audio data. Source   Edit   
proc cancelFineTuneModel(api: OpenAiApi; modelId: string) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Cancel the fine tune model. Source   Edit   
proc createFineTuneDataset(api: OpenAiApi; filepath: string): OpenAIFile {.
    ...raises: [OpenAiError, OSError, IOError, JsonError, ValueError],
    tags: [ReadDirEffect, ExecIOEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
OpenAI fine tuning format is a jsonl file. At least 10 examples are required. 50 to 100 recommended. For a training file with 100,000 tokens trained over 3 epochs, the expected cost would be ~$2.40 USD. File will take time to process while uploading. Maximum file size is 512MB, but not files that big are not recommended. There is a 100gb limit across an organization. See: https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/files/create Source   Edit   
proc createFineTuneJob(api: OpenAiApi; req: OpenAIFinetuneRequest): OpenAIFinetuneJob {.
    ...raises: [ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError, JsonError, ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a fine tune job. Source   Edit

    tags: [], forbids: [].}

proc pullModel(api: OpenAiApi; model: string; timeout: int = 0) {.
    ...raises: [ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Ask Ollama to pull a model. Only for ollama! not for other providers! Source   Edit
